355 GG0170K3_WLK_150_END_CD GG0170K3_WLK_150_END_CD GG0170K3 Discharge Performance Walk 150 Feet Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to walk at least 150 feet in a room, corridor or similar space at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to walk at least 150 feet in a room, corridor or similar space at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal
